summary: The diff implements automatic retry/polling for the Dashboard's stats fetch (REQ-35) through changes to useQueries.ts and Dashboard.tsx. The implementation includes aggressive retry logic, refetchInterval polling, skeleton/spinner loading states, and a non-crashing error fallback without a manual reload button. All acceptance criteria appear to be addressed.

hallucinated_features.description: useGetAllPosts and useGetPostsByCategory hooks were also modified with retry/refetchInterval logic
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request explicitly scopes changes to Dashboard.tsx and the useGetStats hook in useQueries.ts as non-goals include changes to any page other than Dashboard.tsx and the useGetStats hook. The diff also modifies useGetAllPosts (retry: 10, refetchInterval polling) and useGetPostsByCategory (retry: 5) which are outside the stated scope.
